commit.message:
Added AM Archlinux test container and some test fixes. (#2306)

* Regression updates:
- POSIX sh fixes.
- Removed fcp from TEST_APP_LIST_OLD (it was updated last week).

* Updated am-debian/am-ubuntu dockerfiles to support AM tar.gz installs.

* Added AM Archlinux test container (am-arch.dockerfile).

* Fixed AM clone test to work if XDG utils are not present in system.

* POSIX sh compliance fixes.

commit.message:
fix(APP-MANAGER): `warning: command substitution: ignored null byte in input` (#2304)

This happens during updating apps, when `digest` variable is set from `zsync` file.

Fix this issue by trimming the null byte in `digest` variable.

verification.payload:
tree 454771f1855f66728092799783ac3d7d4737bc60
parent 86fb30453118be437157fe8b087c0bf9cb887f97
author fiftydinar <65243233+fiftydinar@users.noreply.github.com> 1777402286 +0200
committer GitHub <noreply@github.com> 1777402286 +0200

fix(APP-MANAGER): `warning: command substitution: ignored null byte in input` (#2304)

This happens during updating apps, when `digest` variable is set from `zsync` file.

Fix this issue by trimming the null byte in `digest` variable.
